<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add PaulRBerg/agent-skills@d3f5540ed2fc0fa07f802bd925e06b9387cbe90f --skill vitest --skill commit --skill code-review -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/vitest`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">
Composed Wave 8 using authoring SSOT (`docs/src/authoring/skills/vitest.mdx`) + research. Do not run `wagents docs generate` on this file (HAND-MAINTAINED sentinel). Run external-skill-auditor before using in production or promoting.
</Aside>

## What It Does

Vitest unit testing framework (Vite-powered). Generated from vitest-dev/vitest official docs. Guidance on testing patterns, config, running suites in Vite-based projects. Complements vite and antfu opinionated preferences.

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add PaulRBerg/agent-skills@d3f5540ed2fc0fa07f802bd925e06b9387cbe90f --skill vitest --skill commit --skill code-review -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Curated mostly install-now-after-trust-gate / curated-trust-gated (except vue which is inspect-then-install). MIT. High-quality maintainer (Anthony Fu, core contributor to Vite/Vitest/Vue ecosystem). 5.3k stars. Skills generated/synced from official upstream docs where possible (except hand-maintained antfu and vendored slidev). Config provenance verified-install-command for listed. For vue specifically: needs-inspection per catalog (reason not expanded in web evidence; may relate to scope of generated Vue core skill or overlap).

Entry maintained via authoring + research for compose-external-wave-8; authoritative install provenance in the collapsed details (config/external-skills.md is source of record for original curation).
